input_text: If some car has a roof, elephants are nice. The city was destroyed. The student carrying the books greeted the teacher. Unexpectedly, the door opened. No penguin can fly. The cake was eaten. The cat sat on the mat and purred. Mike is very big. The guide offered the tourists tea. Nile is 10 meters long. Is John's height equal to Bill's?
